events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo? We're turning it up LOUD.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rocking! Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, forever changing the music landscape. The first video ever played was The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Music TV Revolution
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV burst onto screens, kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it really kill the radio star? We're still here!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' in the UK on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Cast your mind back to '94! Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe', an album that defined a generation. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: On this day in 1969, the legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began in Bethel, New York, bringing together nearly half a million people for '3 Days of Peace & Music'.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, the Woodstock Festival kicked off a weekend of peace, love, and iconic music. If you could have been there, who would you have seen?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Remembering 'The King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977. He would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: On this day, we pay tribute to the one and only King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago. His music lives on forever.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was tragically shot on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas, and died six days later on September 13. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Legacy of a Legend
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the profound impact of Tupac Shakur, a voice that shaped a generation and continues to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970. He would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: 46 years ago, we lost a true guitar visionary, Jimi Hendrix. His influence is immeasurable. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' dropped 57 years ago, giving us that legendary zebra crossing shot. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose voice and style continue to inspire.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and rock 'n' roll icon, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite track featuring that unmistakable voice?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released in UK (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on October 24, 1975.

angles.name: Peace Anthem
angles.copy: 51 years ago, John Lennon's powerful message of peace, 'Imagine', was released in the UK. Its lyrics are as relevant today as ever.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember when the first iPod dropped? 25 years ago, Apple changed the game for music lovers everywhere, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day is celebrated annually on October 5th, marking the 1962 premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No'.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years of 007's suave style, thrilling gadgets, and unforgettable theme tunes. What's your favourite Bond film?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the iconic musician, songwriter, and peace activist John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Today, we honour the enduring legacy of John Lennon, who would have been 86. His music and message continue to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of comedy.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' released (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: Experimental Classic
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album', a sprawling, experimental masterpiece. What are your standout tracks from this iconic double LP?
